name: Stacks
oneliner: Agentic AI platform for enterprise finance teams automating workflows like reconciliation, reporting, and forecasting
finserv: 30 enterprise finance customers including Pleo and Cleo (fintechs); purpose-built for CFO/finance teams
team: Backed by Lightspeed, EQT Ventures, General Catalyst, S16VC
thesis: Stacks validates the thesis that agentic AI is ready for production finance workflows. As enterprise finance teams adopt orchestrated AI agents, they'll need regulated infrastructure partners like You for execution, custody, and data.
